_note: 履歷單一資料來源（中英雙語）。改完跑 build.py 就會同步網站與各平台文案。每個 project 用『問題→做法→影響』案例格式，metrics 放可量化的硬事實。usage 欄位放真實使用數據（裝了流量分析後填），空的話網站不顯示。

profile.name: Elaine Chi

headline.en: Full-Stack AI Product Engineer | Python · JavaScript · LSTM · Smart Contracts | Turning law, finance & blockchain into shipped products
headline.zh: 全端 AI 產品工程師 | Python・JavaScript・LSTM・智慧合約 | 把法律、金融與區塊鏈變成上線的產品

title.zh: 全端 AI 產品工程師

tagline.en: I ship end-to-end products where deep tech (AI · blockchain) meets hard domains (law · finance).
tagline.zh: 我打造從 0 到 1 的完整產品，讓深科技（AI・區塊鏈）遇上硬領域（法律・金融）。

profile.linkedin: TODO：填你的 LinkedIn 網址，沒有先留 ""

summary.en: I'm a full-stack AI product engineer who ships end-to-end — from data pipelines and ML models to interactive front-ends and UX. I build at the intersection of AI, blockchain, and regulated domains (law & finance), where deep tech meets hard domain knowledge. Independently designed and shipped 6+ live products: an interactive 3D digital twin of music-royalty smart contracts with opcode-level execution, an LSTM stock dashboard with news-sentiment that auto-updates every trading day, and a legal-exam platform covering 1,800 official questions across 4 domains and 6 years.
summary.zh: 我是能獨立從 0 到 1 交付的全端 AI 產品工程師 — 從資料管線、機器學習模型，到前端互動與 UX 一手包辦。我專注在 AI、區塊鏈與受監管領域（法律、金融）的交會處，讓深科技遇上硬領域知識。已獨立設計並上線 6+ 個產品：音樂版稅智慧合約的互動式 3D 數位孿生（含 opcode 級執行）、結合新聞情緒、每個交易日自動更新的 LSTM 股市儀表板，以及涵蓋 1,800 題官方考題、跨 4 大領域 6 年的法律考試平台。

name.en: Music Royalty OS — Smart-Contract Digital Twin
name.zh: 音樂版稅 OS · 智慧合約數位孿生

problem.en: Music royalty splits via smart contracts are opaque — stakeholders can't see how money actually flows on-chain.
problem.zh: 音樂版稅用智慧合約分配時黑箱，各方看不到錢實際在鏈上怎麼流動。

approach.en: Built an interactive 3D digital twin with a contract execution lab that traces royalty splits opcode-by-opcode through EVM storage, plus a full single-track lifecycle simulation.
approach.zh: 打造互動式 3D 數位孿生，內含合約執行實驗室，逐 opcode 追蹤版稅分配如何寫進 EVM storage，並模擬單曲完整生命週期。

impact.en: Turns an invisible on-chain process into something six stakeholder roles can understand, in EN/ZH with voice narration and presentation mode.
impact.zh: 把看不見的鏈上流程變成六種角色都看得懂的體驗，中英雙語、語音導覽與演講模式。

problem.en: Retail investors juggle price charts and news separately, with no daily forward view.
problem.zh: 散戶看盤與看新聞是分開的，缺少每日的前瞻預測。

approach.en: Combined LSTM time-series forecasting with news-sentiment analysis across Taiwan, US and crypto markets in one live dashboard.
approach.zh: 把 LSTM 時序預測與新聞情緒分析結合，涵蓋台股、美股、加密貨幣，整合成單一即時儀表板。

impact.en: Auto-updates every trading day with zero manual work, giving a one-glance forward signal across three markets.
impact.zh: 每個交易日全自動更新、零人工，三大市場的前瞻訊號一眼掌握。

name.zh: 司法官・律師複習平台

problem.en: Bar/judicial candidates drown in scattered past papers with no structured, testable way to review.
problem.zh: 考生被散落各處的歷屆考題淹沒，缺乏有結構、可自測的複習方式。

approach.en: Structured 1,800 official exam questions across 4 domains and 6 years by exam-day session, with mask-answer self-testing and TTS read-aloud.
approach.zh: 把 1,800 題官方考題依考試當天節次結構化，涵蓋 4 大領域 6 年，支援遮答案自測與語音念題。

impact.en: One organized, self-quizzing hub replaces dozens of loose PDFs.
impact.zh: 一個有條理、能自測的入口，取代幾十份零散 PDF。

problem.en: Staying current across IP, blockchain, AI and financial-crime research means checking many sources daily.
problem.zh: 要同時追蹤智財、區塊鏈、AI、金融犯罪的最新研究，得每天翻很多來源。

approach.en: Auto-aggregates news, papers and full-text court judgments across four research fields, daily.
approach.zh: 每日自動聚合四大領域的新聞、論文與判決全文。

impact.en: One daily feed replaces manual multi-source monitoring.
impact.zh: 一個每日情報流，取代人工多來源監看。

problem.en: Vocabulary apps are either paid or don't tie learning to spaced testing.
problem.zh: 背單字工具不是要付費，就是沒把學習和間隔測驗連起來。

approach.en: Integrated free dictionary + translation APIs to auto-generate pronunciation, examples, translation and grammar, with flashcard / fill-in / spelling quizzes.
approach.zh: 整合免費字典＋翻譯 API 自動產生發音、例句、翻譯與文法，搭配翻卡／填空／拼字三種測驗。

impact.en: A fully free daily learning loop with self-scoring and weak-word review.
impact.zh: 完全免費的每日學習循環，含學習評分與弱點單字複習。
